description_long: This house is a modern, single-story residential building with a flat roof and a sprawling, rectangular footprint. The exterior features a mix of white and light gray walls, large glass windows, and several open courtyards or terraces with greenery. The layout is open and linear, with multiple rooms arranged along the length of the structure, and some sections projecting outward to create visual interest. The house includes several entry points, visible doors, and a combination of private and communal spaces, as well as landscaped planters integrated into the design. The use of glass and open spaces suggests an emphasis on natural light and indoor-outdoor living. The overall aesthetic is clean, minimalist, and contemporary, with a focus on geometric lines and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and open courtyards, featuring a minimalist and linear design. The exterior is primarily white and gray with integrated greenery and multiple entry points.
description_view_0: This view highlights the depth of the house, showing multiple rooms, open courtyards, and planters along the front edge.
description_view_1: The side elevation reveals the long, linear arrangement of rooms, large windows, and several entryways, emphasizing the house's horizontal layout.
description_view_2: From the rear, the view shows additional outdoor spaces, terraces, and the integration of greenery, as well as the back entrances.
description_view_3: This view displays the full length of the house, with visible courtyards, open areas, and the arrangement of rooms along the main axis.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a minimalist door, no visible steps, and is integrated into the facade with clean lines and subtle landscaping.
